message: Hello! I'm looking to buy, but my budget is quite tight. I can offer around 20. Let me know what price works for you so we can trade consistently every round.
20 is below my cost. To trade, I need price at least 30. I'll ask 30; if you bid 30–40, the midpoint is 30–35. Happy to repeat each round.
I'll ask 33 this round. If you bid 37, price is 35; fair split. Otherwise bid at least 33 to trade. Happy to repeat.
33 is too high for me. My absolute maximum is 31. If you ask 33, we will not trade and both earn 0. Let's both submit 31 so we can continue trading every round.
Your 'max 31' doesn't match your 33 bid. I'll ask 34. Bid at least 36 so we clear about 35. If you bid below 34, no trade. We can repeat at 35 each round.
I bid 33 to guarantee the trade, but 32 gave me almost no profit! My actual limit is 33. I will bid exactly 33 this round. Ask 33 or less, or we won't trade at all.
Let's settle on a trade price of 32 for the remaining rounds. If you ask 31, I will bid 33, resulting in a consistent price of 32 for both of us.
32 is too low. I’ll keep asking 33 each round. If you bid 33, we trade at 33 reliably; bid lower and we skip that round. Let’s lock 33 for all remaining rounds.
I’ll ask 32. Bid 32 or higher each round; if you go lower, I’ll revert to asking 33. Let’s trade reliably for all remaining rounds.
Agreed on 32. I will bid exactly 32 for this and all remaining rounds. Please ask 32 consistently so we both profit reliably and avoid missing any more trades.
Perfect, 32 worked smoothly. I will bid exactly 32 again this round and for all remaining rounds. Please continue to ask 32 so we keep earning steady, guaranteed profits without missing any trades.
Deal. I’ll ask 32 each round. If you bid 32 or higher, we trade; any lower and I’ll revert to asking 33. Let’s lock in 32 every round for guaranteed trades.
Asking 32 again; keep bidding 32 or higher. If you bid below 32 even once, I’ll ask 33 thereafter. If you can bid 34 sometimes, we can average 33. Deal?
I cannot afford to bid 34; 32 is my absolute maximum to make a worthwhile profit. Let's stick strictly to 32. I will bid exactly 32 every round. Please keep asking 32 for guaranteed, steady trades.

Sticking with ask 32 this round and all remaining rounds. Bid 32 or higher to guarantee trades; any lower and I’ll switch to asking 33 permanently. If you ever bid 33, great—midpoint rounds up sometimes. Deal?
Deal. Let's lock in 32 for all remaining rounds. I will bid exactly 32. As mentioned, this is my max for a worthwhile profit, so I cannot bid 33. Let's guarantee our trades.
Asking 32 again this round and going forward. Keep bidding 32 to trade reliably. If you ever bid below 32, I’ll switch to asking 34 permanently. If you can bid 33 sometimes, even better.

Agreed, 32 is working perfectly. I will bid exactly 32 again this round and for all remaining rounds. I really cannot bid 33, my margins are too tight. Please keep asking 32 so we both reliably profit.

Asking 32. Keep bidding 32 to guarantee trades; any lower and I switch to 34 permanently. If you ever bid 33, nice bonus; otherwise we stick with 32 every remaining round.
